state_machine.description: Workflow states, transitions, terminal states (completed/cancelled/abandoned), and guards per transition

persistence_strategy.description: Durable execution approach: how in-flight workflow state survives restarts; state storage and recovery model

human_task_routing.description: Inbox model, actor assignment rules, escalation path, and notification strategy for human steps

timeout_model.description: Per-step timeout policy, what state the workflow enters on expiry, and escalation chain

audit_strategy.description: What events are recorded, retention policy, consumers, and whether audit records survive workflow cancellation

testing_strategy.description: State machine test approach, human task simulation strategy, and timeout/expiry testing

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements: task assignment latency, workflow completion SLA, audit record durability

open_questions.description: Unresolved architectural ambiguities blocking the tech stack stage
